description_long: This is a rectangular upholstered bench with a patterned fabric seat featuring a repeating diamond motif in shades of gray and white. The seat is supported by four robust, turned wooden legs connected by a pair of horizontal stretchers for added stability. The legs and stretchers are finished in a dark, almost black wood stain, providing a strong contrast to the lighter seat. The bench has no backrest or armrests, making it accessible from all sides and suitable for communal or waiting areas. Its design is both classic and versatile, blending traditional craftsmanship with a modern geometric textile. The overall proportions suggest it is intended for multiple users, ideal for placement in public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A rectangular bench with a patterned upholstered seat and dark wooden legs, featuring a classic yet modern design without backrest or armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the patterned seat and the four turned wooden legs with connecting stretchers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the bench and the depth of the patterned seat.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the seat and leg structure from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the length of the bench.
attribute_leg_design: four turned wooden legs with horizontal stretchers
